# Agenda for health policy discussion (2026-03-09 03:16Z)

_**User**_

José Gomes Temporão
Médico sanitarista e pesquisador com trajetória consolidada na saúde pública brasileira. Foi ministro da Saúde entre 2007 e 2010, período em que conduziu políticas estratégicas de fortalecimento do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), com ênfase na ampliação do acesso a medicamentos, na consolidação do complexo industrial da saúde e em ações de prevenção e promoção. Antes de assumir o ministério, atuou como diretor do Instituto Nacional de Câncer (INCA) e teve longa vinculação à Fundação Oswaldo Cruz (Fiocruz), onde desenvolveu pesquisas e atividades de gestão. É reconhecido pela atuação técnica e pelo protagonismo em debates estruturantes sobre financiamento, regulação e organização do sistema de saúde no Brasil.

Kelly Curitiba

Enfermeira, Palestrante, professora facilitadora e servidora da Secretaria Municipal de Saúde/RJ. Atua na Sala Lilás/IML Campo Grande, acolhendo pessoas em situações de violências. Pós-graduada em Equidade na Gestão do Trabalho e da Educação no Sistema Único de Saúde/MS, é também especialista em enfermagem forense, em impactos da violência na saúde, em políticas públicas e sociais para mulheres, em docência do nível superior e em metodologias ativas. Assina coparticipações em capítulos de livros sobre a temática da violência doméstica e de gênero e foi vencedora do Prêmio Espírito Público, na categoria Saúde, em 2024.




Lígia Bahia 

Médica sanitarista, professora da Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro (UFRJ) e uma das principais referências no campo da saúde coletiva no Brasil. É Cientista do Nosso Estado, título concedido pela Fundação Carlos Chagas Filho de Amparo à Pesquisa do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (Faperj), e pesquisadora de produtividade do Conselho Nacional de Desenvolvimento Científico e Tecnológico (CNPq). Coordena o Grupo de Pesquisa e Documentação sobre Empresariamento da Saúde, dedicado ao estudo das relações público-privadas, da financeirização e da dinâmica empresarial no setor de saúde. Com ampla produção acadêmica e atuação destacada no debate público, desenvolve pesquisas sobre políticas de saúde, regulação, planos e seguros privados e os desafios estruturais do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), contribuindo para a formulação e a análise crítica de políticas públicas na área.



Miguel Lago 

Cientista político formado em Sciences Po Paris e mestre em administração pública pela mesma instituição. Fundou e presidiu a rede de mobilização Meu Rio e o Nossas. É professor visitante da School of International and Public Affairs da Universidade de Columbia, em Nova York, e da École d’Affaires Publiques de Sciences Po Paris.





Ricardo de Oliveira

Engenheiro de produção, foi secretário estadual de Gestão e Recursos Humanos do Espírito Santo (ES) entre 2005 e 2010 e secretário estadual de Saúde do ES de 2015 a 2018. Publicou os livros "Gestão Pública: Democracia e Eficiência" (2012) e "Gestão Pública e Saúde" (2020) pela editora da FGV. É membro do comitê de filantropia da Umane e membro associado do observatório do gasto público do Insper.

implemente esse conteudo no lugar da outra agenda, que será 9 de março de 2026

   \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Em um ano marcado por eleições, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; é uma iniciativa apartidária, sem fins lucrativos e de duração limitada que promove debates públicos sobre temas essenciais para o Estado do Rio de Janeiro. O objetivo é qualificar a discussão eleitoral e influenciar planos de governo e agendas legislativas dos candidatos a governador, senador e deputados federais e estaduais.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;Ao longo do primeiro semestre de 2026, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; organiza encontros com especialistas, promove escuta pública estruturada e usa tecnologia para transformar conhecimento disperso – estudos, dados, referências – em prioridades claras, caminhos de implementação e indicadores de acompanhamento.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;O resultado é um documento público organizado em capítulos temáticos – uma agenda mínima e prioritária focada em viabilidade, impacto e entrega. Não é campanha. Pós-graduada em Equidade na Gestão do Trabalho e da Educação no Sistema Único de Saúde/MS, é também especialista em enfermagem forense, em impactos da violência na saúde, em políticas públicas e sociais para mulheres, em docência do nível superior e em metodologias ativas.  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"meta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"RioAgora.org — Um Rio de futuros\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Iniciativa apartidária que promove debates públicos sobre temas essenciais para o Estado do Rio de Janeiro.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ogImage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/brand/RioAgora_RGB.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://rioagora.org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"hero\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Um &lt;br/&gt;Rio de&lt;br/&gt;Futuros\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"slides\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n      { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/hero/slide-01.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"alt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Vista aérea do Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n      { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/hero/slide-02.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"alt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Paisagem urbana do Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n      { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/hero/slide-03.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"alt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Rio de Janeiro ao entardecer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" },\\\\\\\\n      { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/hero/slide-04.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"alt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Vista panorâmica do Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"about\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Em um ano marcado por eleições, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; é uma iniciativa apartidária, sem fins lucrativos e de duração limitada que promove debates públicos sobre temas essenciais para o Estado do Rio de Janeiro. O objetivo é qualificar a discussão eleitoral e influenciar planos de governo e agendas legislativas dos candidatos a governador, senador e deputados federais e estaduais.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;Ao longo do primeiro semestre de 2026, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; organiza encontros com especialistas, promove escuta pública estruturada e usa tecnologia para transformar conhecimento disperso – estudos, dados, referências – em prioridades claras, caminhos de implementação e indicadores de acompanhamento.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;O resultado é um documento público organizado em capítulos temáticos – uma agenda mínima e prioritária focada em viabilidade, impacto e entrega. Não é campanha. É engenharia de políticas públicas e implementação, com máxima inteligência e máximo pragmatismo, para o Estado do Rio de Janeiro.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"team\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"members\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Guilherme Cezar Coelho\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Formado em economia pela Universidade Stanford, é fundador da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, organização dedicada a promover a excelência do serviço público brasileiro, e da &lt;strong&gt;MaisProgresso.org&lt;/strong&gt;, dedicada a políticas econômicas para maior crescimento e melhor distribuição de renda. Como cineasta, dirigiu filmes como &lt;em&gt;Fala tu&lt;/em&gt; (2004), &lt;em&gt;Órfãos do Eldorado&lt;/em&gt; (2015) e &lt;em&gt;Oceânico&lt;/em&gt;, a ser lançado em 2026.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eloy H.S. Oliveira\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Doutorando (ABD) em Políticas Públicas na Lyndon B. Johnson School of Public Affairs, da Universidade do Texas em Austin, é bacharel em Direito pela UFMG e mestre em Administração Pública pela Columbia University. Atuou por quase uma década no Governo de Minas Gerais e, posteriormente, foi diretor e membro do Conselho da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, liderando projetos com governos e parceiros internacionais voltados ao fortalecimento da gestão pública por meio de dados, pesquisa e reformas baseadas em evidências, além de iniciativas de inclusão e desenvolvimento de lideranças no setor público.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Isabel De Luca\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Jornalista com pós-graduação na Universidade da Califórnia em Los Angeles (UCLA), trabalhou por mais de 20 anos nas redações do &lt;em&gt;Jornal do Brasil&lt;/em&gt; e do &lt;em&gt;Globo&lt;/em&gt;, onde atuou como repórter, editora e correspondente em Nova York. De 2017 a 2022, foi head da Hysteria, plataforma de mídia e entretenimento centrada em narrativas femininas da produtora Conspiração. É criadora, roteirista e produtora de uma trilogia de documentários sobre mulheres: &lt;em&gt;De Você Fiz Meu Samba&lt;/em&gt;, &lt;em&gt;Helô&lt;/em&gt; e &lt;em&gt;Mulheres Radicais&lt;/em&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Julia Paiva\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Com mais de 20 anos de experiência em finanças corporativas, atuou como diretora financeira da Asgaard Navegação, foi sócia e diretora financeira de sociedade de investimentos e gestão do setor imobiliário e assessora financeira do Bank of America. Formada em Economia, tem MBA na Fundação Getúlio Vargas e é também conselheira profissional pela FGV.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"footer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; é uma ação da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, organização também apartidária e sem fins lucrativos que há dez anos se dedica à melhoria da gestão de pessoas no serviço público brasileiro. O financiamento é de &lt;a href=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://afloresta.org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" target=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"_blank\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;AFloresta.org&lt;/a&gt;, um coletivo de iniciativas com o objetivo de reduzir a desigualdade de renda no Brasil.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"events\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Debate 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"subtitle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Educação\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"date\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2026-02-23\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dateDisplay\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"23 de fevereiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"16h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"location\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Auditório do Palácio Capanema – Rua da Imprensa 16, Centro, Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/agenda/capanema.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"participants\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Anna Backheuser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Instituto João e Maria Backheuser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/annabakheuser.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Formada em Comunicação Social pela PUC-RJ e em Arquitetura pela USU-RJ, com formação complementar no Insper em Mensuração de Impacto Social e em Gestão de Políticas e Projetos Baseados em Evidências. Foi sócia do Ateliê de Arquitetura por mais de 15 anos. Após atuar por seis anos como diretora do Instituto João e Maria Backheuser (IJMB), assumiu, em 2023, a presidência do Conselho da organização. Desde então, lidera o fortalecimento da governança institucional e a consolidação de parcerias estratégicas com municípios do Estado do Rio de Janeiro, apoiando a estruturação, implementação e monitoramento de políticas públicas de alfabetização orientadas por evidências, com o compromisso de assegurar que todas as crianças sejam alfabetizadas na idade adequada. É uma das fundadoras do movimento EducAçãoRio, que defende uma educação pública de qualidade no Estado do Rio de Janeiro, atuando na mobilização da sociedade civil e no fortalecimento das gestões públicas.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Antoine Lousao\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestor público com mais de 15 anos de experiência em funções de liderança em governos e empresas públicas, sendo mais de uma década nas redes estadual e municipal de educação do Rio de Janeiro, incluindo o cargo de Secretário Municipal de Educação. Trabalhou por mais de três anos como consultor em projetos de governos e empresas públicas, entre eles diversas secretarias estaduais de educação. Atualmente é subsecretário executivo da Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. Tem formação nas áreas de administração pública, filosofia política e economia (em conclusão).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Julia Sant'Anna\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Centro de Inovação para a Educação Brasileira (CIEB)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/julia-santanna.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Diretora executiva do Centro de Inovação para a Educação Brasileira (CIEB). Doutora em Ciência Política pelo IESP/UERJ e mestre em Estudos de Desenvolvimento pela Universidade de Londres, foi secretária de Estado de Educação de Minas Gerais, entre 2019 e 2022, e subsecretária de Infraestrutura e Tecnologia da Secretaria de Estado de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. É servidora pública licenciada do RJ pela carreira de especialista em políticas públicas e gestão governamental.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Ricardo Henriques\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Instituto Unibanco\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/ricardo-henriques.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Economista, há três décadas atua na formulação, implementação e avaliação de políticas públicas voltadas para a redução das desigualdades sociais, com ênfase na educação como vetor de transformação. Um dos idealizadores do Bolsa Família, também concebeu e implementou a Secretaria de Educação Continuada, Alfabetização e Diversidade (SECAD) e liderou o desenvolvimento do programa UPP Social no Rio de Janeiro. Hoje é superintendente executivo do Instituto Unibanco, professor da Fundação Dom Cabral, presidente do Conselho de Administração da Anistia Internacional Brasil e membro do Conselho de Desenvolvimento Econômico Social Sustentável.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        ],\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mediator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eloy H.S. Oliveira\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"diretor executivo RioAgora.org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"footer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"copyright\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"© {year} RioAgora.org — Todos os direitos reservados.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tagline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Um Rio de futuros\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Em um ano marcado por eleições, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; é uma iniciativa O objetivo é qualificar a discussão eleitoral e influenciar planos de governo e agendas legislativas dos candidatos a governador, senador e deputados federais e estaduais.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;Ao longo do primeiro semestre de 2026, &lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; organiza encontros com especialistas, promove escuta pública estruturada e usa tecnologia para transformar conhecimento disperso – estudos, dados, referências – em prioridades claras, caminhos de implementação e indicadores de acompanhamento.&lt;/p&gt;&lt;p&gt;O resultado é um documento público organizado em capítulos temáticos – uma agenda mínima e prioritária focada em viabilidade, impacto e entrega. Não é campanha. É engenharia de políticas públicas e implementação, com máxima inteligência e máximo pragmatismo, para o Estado do Rio de Janeiro.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"team\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"members\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Guilherme Cezar Coelho\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Formado em economia pela Universidade Stanford, é fundador da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, organização dedicada a promover a excelência do serviço público brasileiro, e da &lt;strong&gt;MaisProgresso.org&lt;/strong&gt;, dedicada a políticas econômicas para maior crescimento e melhor distribuição de renda. Como cineasta, dirigiu filmes como &lt;em&gt;Fala tu&lt;/em&gt; (2004), &lt;em&gt;Órfãos do Eldorado&lt;/em&gt; (2015) e &lt;em&gt;Oceânico&lt;/em&gt;, a ser lançado em 2026.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eloy H.S. Oliveira\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Doutorando (ABD) em Políticas Públicas na Lyndon B. Johnson School of Public Affairs, da Universidade do Texas em Austin, é bacharel em Direito pela UFMG e mestre em Administração Pública pela Columbia University. Atuou por quase uma década no Governo de Minas Gerais e, posteriormente, foi diretor e membro do Conselho da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, liderando projetos com governos e parceiros internacionais voltados ao fortalecimento da gestão pública por meio de dados, pesquisa e reformas baseadas em evidências, além de iniciativas de inclusão e desenvolvimento de lideranças no setor público.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Isabel De Luca\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Jornalista com pós-graduação na Universidade da Califórnia em Los Angeles (UCLA), trabalhou por mais de 20 anos nas redações do &lt;em&gt;Jornal do Brasil&lt;/em&gt; e do &lt;em&gt;Globo&lt;/em&gt;, onde atuou como repórter, editora e correspondente em Nova York. De 2017 a 2022, foi head da Hysteria, plataforma de mídia e entretenimento centrada em narrativas femininas da produtora Conspiração. É criadora, roteirista e produtora de uma trilogia de documentários sobre mulheres: &lt;em&gt;De Você Fiz Meu Samba&lt;/em&gt;, &lt;em&gt;Helô&lt;/em&gt; e &lt;em&gt;Mulheres Radicais&lt;/em&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      },\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Julia Paiva\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Com mais de 20 anos de experiência em finanças corporativas, atuou como diretora financeira da Asgaard Navegação, foi sócia e diretora financeira de sociedade de investimentos e gestão do setor imobiliário e assessora financeira do Bank of America. Formada em Economia, tem MBA na Fundação Getúlio Vargas e é também conselheira profissional pela FGV.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    ],\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"footer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;&lt;strong&gt;RioAgora.org&lt;/strong&gt; é uma ação da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, organização também apartidária e sem fins lucrativos que há dez anos se dedica à melhoria da gestão de pessoas no serviço público brasileiro. O financiamento é de &lt;a href=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://afloresta.org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" target=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"_blank\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&gt;AFloresta.org&lt;/a&gt;, um coletivo de iniciativas com o objetivo de reduzir a desigualdade de renda no Brasil.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"events\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n      {\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"label\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Debate 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"subtitle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Educação\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"date\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2026-02-23\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dateDisplay\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"23 de fevereiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"16h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"location\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Auditório do Palácio Capanema – Rua da Imprensa 16, Centro, Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/agenda/capanema.jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"participants\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Anna Backheuser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Instituto João e Maria Backheuser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/annabakheuser.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Formada em Comunicação Social pela PUC-RJ e em Arquitetura pela USU-RJ, com formação complementar no Insper em Mensuração de Impacto Social e em Gestão de Políticas e Projetos Baseados em Evidências. Foi sócia do Ateliê de Arquitetura por mais de 15 anos. Após atuar por seis anos como diretora do Instituto João e Maria Backheuser (IJMB), assumiu, em 2023, a presidência do Conselho da organização. Desde então, lidera o fortalecimento da governança institucional e a consolidação de parcerias estratégicas com municípios do Estado do Rio de Janeiro, apoiando a estruturação, implementação e monitoramento de políticas públicas de alfabetização orientadas por evidências, com o compromisso de assegurar que todas as crianças sejam alfabetizadas na idade adequada. É uma das fundadoras do movimento EducAçãoRio, que defende uma educação pública de qualidade no Estado do Rio de Janeiro, atuando na mobilização da sociedade civil e no fortalecimento das gestões públicas.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Antoine Lousao\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/antoine-lousao.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestor público com mais de 15 anos de experiência em funções de liderança em governos e empresas públicas, sendo mais de uma década nas redes estadual e municipal de educação do Rio de Janeiro, incluindo o cargo de Secretário Municipal de Educação. Trabalhou por mais de três anos como consultor em projetos de governos e empresas públicas, entre eles diversas secretarias estaduais de educação. Atualmente é subsecretário executivo da Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. Tem formação nas áreas de administração pública, filosofia política e economia (em conclusão).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Julia Sant'Anna\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Centro de Inovação para a Educação Brasileira (CIEB)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/julia-santanna.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Diretora executiva do Centro de Inovação para a Educação Brasileira (CIEB). Doutora em Ciência Política pelo IESP/UERJ e mestre em Estudos de Desenvolvimento pela Universidade de Londres, foi secretária de Estado de Educação de Minas Gerais, entre 2019 e 2022, e subsecretária de Infraestrutura e Tecnologia da Secretaria de Estado de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. É servidora pública licenciada do RJ pela carreira de especialista em políticas públicas e gestão governamental.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          },\\\\\\\\n          {\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Ricardo Henriques\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Instituto Unibanco\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/images/people/ricardo-henriques.webp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Economista, há três décadas atua na formulação, implementação e avaliação de políticas públicas voltadas para a redução das desigualdades sociais, com ênfase na educação como vetor de transformação. Um dos idealizadores do Bolsa Família, também concebeu e implementou a Secretaria de Educação Continuada, Alfabetização e Diversidade (SECAD) e liderou o desenvolvimento do programa UPP Social no Rio de Janeiro. Hoje é superintendente executivo do Instituto Unibanco, professor da Fundação Dom Cabral, presidente do Conselho de Administração da Anistia Internacional Brasil e membro do Conselho de Desenvolvimento Econômico Social Sustentável.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        ],\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mediator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eloy H.S. Oliveira\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"diretor executivo RioAgora.org\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"footer\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"copyright\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"© {year} RioAgora.org — Todos os direitos reservados.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"tagline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Um Rio de futuros\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLines\\\\\\\":96,\\\\\\\"fileSize\\\\\\\":9146,\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Work\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws-rio-agora\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\product\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\landing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\site-content.json\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"readRange\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startLine\\\\\\\":1,\\\\\\\"endLine\\\\\\\":96}}}}}\\\"},\\\"capabilityType\\\":15}\",\"ff601d13-d32f-4d43-abbe-f4531c5f05b4\":\"{\\\"_v\\\":3,\\\"type\\\":2,\\\"approximateLintErrors\\\":[],\\\"lints\\\":[],\\\"codebaseContextChunks\\\":[],\\\"commits\\\":[],\\\"pullRequests\\\":[],\\\"attachedCodeChunks\\\":[],\\\"assistantSuggestedDiffs\\\":[],\\\"gitDiffs\\\":[],\\\"interpreterResults\\\":[],\\\"images\\\":[],\\\"attachedFolders\\\":[],\\\"attachedFoldersNew\\\":[],\\\"bubbleId\\\":\\\"7be3ae52-0bb4-4b7a-8441-e57abe9331bb\\\",\\\"userResponsesToSuggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"suggestedCodeBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsForCompressingFiles\\\":[],\\\"relevantFiles\\\":[],\\\"toolResults\\\":[],\\\"notepads\\\":[],\\\"capabilities\\\":[],\\\"multiFileLinterErrors\\\":[],\\\"diffHistories\\\":[],\\\"recentLocationsHistory\\\":[],\\\"recentlyViewedFiles\\\":[],\\\"isAgentic\\\":false,\\\"fileDiffTrajectories\\\":[],\\\"existedSubsequentTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"existedPreviousTerminalCommand\\\":false,\\\"docsReferences\\\":[],\\\"webReferences\\\":[],\\\"aiWebSearchResults\\\":[],\\\"requestId\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"attachedFoldersListDirResults\\\":[],\\\"humanChanges\\\":[],\\\"attachedHumanChanges\\\":false,\\\"summarizedComposers\\\":[],\\\"cursorRules\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommands\\\":[],\\\"cursorCommandsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"pastChats\\\":[],\\\"pastChatsExplicitlySet\\\":false,\\\"contextPieces\\\":[],\\\"editTrailContexts\\\":[],\\\"allThinkingBlocks\\\":[],\\\"diffsSinceLastApply\\\":[],\\\"deletedFiles\\\":[],\\\"supportedTools\\\":[],\\\"tokenCount\\\":{\\\"inputTokens\\\":0,\\\"outputTokens\\\":0},\\\"attachedFileCodeChunksMetadataOnly\\\":[],\\\"consoleLogs\\\":[],\\\"uiElementPicked\\\":[],\\\"isRefunded\\\":false,\\\"knowledgeItems\\\":[],\\\"documentationSelections\\\":[],\\\"externalLinks\\\":[],\\\"projectLayouts\\\":[],\\\"unifiedMode\\\":2,\\\"capabilityContexts\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"createdAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-09T03:24:37.356Z\\\",\\\"mcpDescriptors\\\":[],\\\"workspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"toolFormerData\\\":{\\\"toolCallId\\\":\\\"tool_6bec3bee-d2cf-4712-a795-6fa0eed2cf1\\\",\\\"toolIndex\\\":0,\\\"modelCallId\\\":\\\"tool_6bec3bee-d2cf-4712-a795-6fa0eed2cf1\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"read_file_v2\\\",\\\"rawArgs\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Work\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws-rio-agora\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\product\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\landing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"tool\\\":40,\\\"params\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"targetFile\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Work\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws-rio-agora\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\product\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\landing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"charsLimit\\\\\\\":1000000,\\\\\\\"effectiveUri\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Work\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws-rio-agora\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\product\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\landing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"}\\\",\\\"result\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# RioAgora.org — Landing Page\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nStatic landing page for [RioAgora.org](https://rioagora.org), a nonpartisan initiative promoting public debates on essential topics for the State of Rio de Janeiro ahead of the 2026 elections.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Next.js 16** — static export (&#96;output: 'export'&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- **Tailwind CSS v4** — utility-first styling\\\\\\\\n- **Motion** — scroll-triggered animations and transitions\\\\\\\\n- **Lenis** — smooth scroll\\\\\\\\n- **Cloudflare Pages** — hosting and deployment\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 18+\\\\\\\\n- [pnpm](https://pnpm.io/) package manager\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm dev\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nStarts the dev server at [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Build\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm build\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nProduces a static export in the &#96;out/&#96; directory.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deploy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm run deploy\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBuilds the site and deploys to Cloudflare Pages in a single command. On first run, Wrangler will prompt you to create the project if it doesn't exist yet.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Switching Cloudflare Accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Log in (opens browser for OAuth)\\\\\\\\nwrangler login\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Verify which account is active\\\\\\\\nwrangler whoami\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nTo deploy under a different account, run &#96;wrangler login&#96; and authenticate with the desired Cloudflare account before deploying.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Content Editing\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAll landing page copy lives in a single file:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nsrc/content/site-content.json\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe JSON is organized into sections:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Key | Description |\\\\\\\\n|---|---|\\\\\\\\n| &#96;meta&#96; | Page title, description, OG image, canonical URL |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;hero&#96; | Tagline, title overlay, slideshow image paths |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;about&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — section title and rich-text HTML content |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;team&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — section title, member cards (name, bio HTML, image), footer text |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;agenda&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — events array with date, time, location, participants, mediator |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;footer&#96; | Copyright text and tagline |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRich-text fields (&#96;about.content&#96;, &#96;team.members[].bio&#96;, &#96;team.footer&#96;) use HTML strings with &#96;&lt;p&gt;&#96;, &#96;&lt;strong&gt;&#96;, &#96;&lt;em&gt;&#96;, and &#96;&lt;a&gt;&#96; tags. Edit them directly in the JSON.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAfter editing content, rebuild and deploy:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm run deploy\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nlanding/\\\\\\\\n├── public/\\\\\\\\n│   └── images/\\\\\\\\n│       ├── brand/        # Logo variants (RGB, negative, mono, seals)\\\\\\\\n│       ├── hero/         # Slideshow background images\\\\\\\\n│       ├── people/       # Team member photos\\\\\\\\n│       └── agenda/       # Event venue images\\\\\\\\n├── src/\\\\\\\\n│   ├── app/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── layout.jsx    # Root layout (fonts, metadata, JSON-LD, Lenis)\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── page.jsx      # Main page composing all sections\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── globals.css   # Base styles, Tailwind imports, brand colors\\\\\\\\n│   ├── components/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── AnimatedText.jsx   # Split-text reveal animation\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Typography.jsx     # SectionTitle, SectionText, CardName, RichText\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Hero.jsx           # Fullscreen hero with slideshow\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── About.jsx          # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" section\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Team.jsx           # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with stacking cards\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Agenda.jsx         # Events listing\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── EventCard.jsx      # Individual event card\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── Footer.jsx         # Footer with copyright\\\\\\\\n│   ├── content/\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── site-content.json  # All page copy and data\\\\\\\\n│   ├── providers/\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── LenisProvider.jsx  # Smooth scroll provider\\\\\\\\n│   └── typography/\\\\\\\\n│       ├── index.js           # Font declarations (Intro family)\\\\\\\\n│       └── fonts/             # .woff2 font files\\\\\\\\n├── next.config.mjs\\\\\\\\n├── wrangler.toml\\\\\\\\n└── package.json\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nJosé Gomes Temporão\\\\\\\\nMédico sanitarista e pesquisador com trajetória consolidada na saúde pública brasileira. Foi ministro da Saúde entre 2007 e 2010, período em que conduziu políticas estratégicas de fortalecimento do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), com ênfase na ampliação do acesso a medicamentos, na consolidação do complexo industrial da saúde e em ações de prevenção e promoção. Antes de assumir o ministério, atuou como diretor do Instituto Nacional de Câncer (INCA) e teve longa vinculação à Fundação Oswaldo Cruz (Fiocruz), onde desenvolveu pesquisas e atividades de gestão. É reconhecido pela atuação técnica e pelo protagonismo em debates estruturantes sobre financiamento, regulação e organização do sistema de saúde no Brasil.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKelly Curitiba\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nEnfermeira, Palestrante, professora facilitadora e servidora da Secretaria Municipal de Saúde/RJ. Atua na Sala Lilás/IML Campo Grande, acolhendo pessoas em situações de violências. Pós-graduada em Equidade na Gestão do Trabalho e da Educação no Sistema Único de Saúde/MS, é também especialista em enfermagem forense, em impactos da violência na saúde, em políticas públicas e sociais para mulheres, em docência do nível superior e em metodologias ativas. Assina coparticipações em capítulos de livros sobre a temática da violência doméstica e de gênero e foi vencedora do Prêmio Espírito Público, na categoria Saúde, em 2024.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nLígia Bahia \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMédica sanitarista, professora da Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro (UFRJ) e uma das principais referências no campo da saúde coletiva no Brasil. É Cientista do Nosso Estado, título concedido pela Fundação Carlos Chagas Filho de Amparo à Pesquisa do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (Faperj), e pesquisadora de produtividade do Conselho Nacional de Desenvolvimento Científico e Tecnológico (CNPq). Coordena o Grupo de Pesquisa e Documentação sobre Empresariamento da Saúde, dedicado ao estudo das relações público-privadas, da financeirização e da dinâmica empresarial no setor de saúde. Com ampla produção acadêmica e atuação destacada no debate público, desenvolve pesquisas sobre políticas de saúde, regulação, planos e seguros privados e os desafios estruturais do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), contribuindo para a formulação e a análise crítica de políticas públicas na área.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMiguel Lago \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCientista político formado em Sciences Po Paris e mestre em administração pública pela mesma instituição. Fundou e presidiu a rede de mobilização Meu Rio e o Nossas. É professor visitante da School of International and Public Affairs da Universidade de Columbia, em Nova York, e da École d’Affaires Publiques de Sciences Po Paris.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRicardo de Oliveira\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nEngenheiro de produção, foi secretário estadual de Gestão e Recursos Humanos do Espírito Santo (ES) entre 2005 e 2010 e secretário estadual de Saúde do ES de 2015 a 2018. Publicou os livros \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestão Pública: Democracia e Eficiência\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (2012) e \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestão Pública e Saúde\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (2020) pela editora da FGV. É membro do comitê de filantropia da Umane e membro associado do observatório do gasto público do Insper.\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"totalLinesInFile\\\\\\\":149}\\\",\\\"toolCall\\\":\\\"{\\\\\\\"readToolCall\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"args\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"path\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"D:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Work\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ws-rio-agora\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\product\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\landing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\README.md\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\"result\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# RioAgora.org — Landing Page\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nStatic landing page for [RioAgora.org](https://rioagora.org), a nonpartisan initiative promoting public debates on essential topics for the State of Rio de Janeiro ahead of the 2026 elections.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Next.js 16** — static export (&#96;output: 'export'&#96;)\\\\\\\\n- **Tailwind CSS v4** — utility-first styling\\\\\\\\n- **Motion** — scroll-triggered animations and transitions\\\\\\\\n- **Lenis** — smooth scroll\\\\\\\\n- **Cloudflare Pages** — hosting and deployment\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 18+\\\\\\\\n- [pnpm](https://pnpm.io/) package manager\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Development\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm dev\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nStarts the dev server at [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Build\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm build\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nProduces a static export in the &#96;out/&#96; directory.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deploy\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm run deploy\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nBuilds the site and deploys to Cloudflare Pages in a single command. On first run, Wrangler will prompt you to create the project if it doesn't exist yet.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Switching Cloudflare Accounts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Log in (opens browser for OAuth)\\\\\\\\nwrangler login\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Verify which account is active\\\\\\\\nwrangler whoami\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nTo deploy under a different account, run &#96;wrangler login&#96; and authenticate with the desired Cloudflare account before deploying.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Content Editing\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAll landing page copy lives in a single file:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nsrc/content/site-content.json\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe JSON is organized into sections:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Key | Description |\\\\\\\\n|---|---|\\\\\\\\n| &#96;meta&#96; | Page title, description, OG image, canonical URL |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;hero&#96; | Tagline, title overlay, slideshow image paths |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;about&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — section title and rich-text HTML content |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;team&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — section title, member cards (name, bio HTML, image), footer text |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;agenda&#96; | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agenda\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" — events array with date, time, location, participants, mediator |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;footer&#96; | Copyright text and tagline |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRich-text fields (&#96;about.content&#96;, &#96;team.members[].bio&#96;, &#96;team.footer&#96;) use HTML strings with &#96;&lt;p&gt;&#96;, &#96;&lt;strong&gt;&#96;, &#96;&lt;em&gt;&#96;, and &#96;&lt;a&gt;&#96; tags. Edit them directly in the JSON.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAfter editing content, rebuild and deploy:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npnpm run deploy\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nlanding/\\\\\\\\n├── public/\\\\\\\\n│   └── images/\\\\\\\\n│       ├── brand/        # Logo variants (RGB, negative, mono, seals)\\\\\\\\n│       ├── hero/         # Slideshow background images\\\\\\\\n│       ├── people/       # Team member photos\\\\\\\\n│       └── agenda/       # Event venue images\\\\\\\\n├── src/\\\\\\\\n│   ├── app/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── layout.jsx    # Root layout (fonts, metadata, JSON-LD, Lenis)\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── page.jsx      # Main page composing all sections\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── globals.css   # Base styles, Tailwind imports, brand colors\\\\\\\\n│   ├── components/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── AnimatedText.jsx   # Split-text reveal animation\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Typography.jsx     # SectionTitle, SectionText, CardName, RichText\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Hero.jsx           # Fullscreen hero with slideshow\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── About.jsx          # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" section\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Team.jsx           # \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" with stacking cards\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── Agenda.jsx         # Events listing\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── EventCard.jsx      # Individual event card\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── Footer.jsx         # Footer with copyright\\\\\\\\n│   ├── content/\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── site-content.json  # All page copy and data\\\\\\\\n│   ├── providers/\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── LenisProvider.jsx  # Smooth scroll provider\\\\\\\\n│   └── typography/\\\\\\\\n│       ├── index.js           # Font declarations (Intro family)\\\\\\\\n│       └── fonts/             # .woff2 font files\\\\\\\\n├── next.config.mjs\\\\\\\\n├── wrangler.toml\\\\\\\\n└── package.json\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nJosé Gomes Temporão\\\\\\\\nMédico sanitarista e pesquisador com trajetória consolidada na saúde pública brasileira. Foi ministro da Saúde entre 2007 e 2010, período em que conduziu políticas estratégicas de fortalecimento do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), com ênfase na ampliação do acesso a medicamentos, na consolidação do complexo industrial da saúde e em ações de prevenção e promoção. Antes de assumir o ministério, atuou como diretor do Instituto Nacional de Câncer (INCA) e teve longa vinculação à Fundação Oswaldo Cruz (Fiocruz), onde desenvolveu pesquisas e atividades de gestão. É reconhecido pela atuação técnica e pelo protagonismo em debates estruturantes sobre financiamento, regulação e organização do sistema de saúde no Brasil.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nKelly Curitiba\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nEnfermeira, Palestrante, professora facilitadora e servidora da Secretaria Municipal de Saúde/RJ. Atua na Sala Lilás/IML Campo Grande, acolhendo pessoas em situações de violências. Pós-graduada em Equidade na Gestão do Trabalho e da Educação no Sistema Único de Saúde/MS, é também especialista em enfermagem forense, em impactos da violência na saúde, em políticas públicas e sociais para mulheres, em docência do nível superior e em metodologias ativas. Assina coparticipações em capítulos de livros sobre a temática da violência doméstica e de gênero e foi vencedora do Prêmio Espírito Público, na categoria Saúde, em 2024.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nLígia Bahia \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMédica sanitarista, professora da Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro (UFRJ) e uma das principais referências no campo da saúde coletiva no Brasil. É Cientista do Nosso Estado, título concedido pela Fundação Carlos Chagas Filho de Amparo à Pesquisa do Estado do Rio de Janeiro (Faperj), e pesquisadora de produtividade do Conselho Nacional de Desenvolvimento Científico e Tecnológico (CNPq). Coordena o Grupo de Pesquisa e Documentação sobre Empresariamento da Saúde, dedicado ao estudo das relações público-privadas, da financeirização e da dinâmica empresarial no setor de saúde. Com ampla produção acadêmica e atuação destacada no debate público, desenvolve pesquisas sobre políticas de saúde, regulação, planos e seguros privados e os desafios estruturais do Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS), contribuindo para a formulação e a análise crítica de políticas públicas na área.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMiguel Lago \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nCientista político formado em Sciences Po Paris e mestre em administração pública pela mesma instituição. Fundou e presidiu a rede de mobilização Meu Rio e o Nossas. É professor visitante da School of International and Public Affairs da Universidade de Columbia, em Nova York, e da École d’Affaires Publiques de Sciences Po Paris.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nRicardo de Oliveira\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nEngenheiro de produção, foi secretário estadual de Gestão e Recursos Humanos do Espírito Santo (ES) entre 2005 e 2010 e secretário estadual de Saúde do ES de 2015 a 2018. Publicou os livros \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestão Pública: Democracia e Eficiência\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (2012) e \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestão Pública e Saúde\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" (2020) pela editora da FGV. É membro do comitê de filantropia da Umane e membro associado do observatório do gasto público do {event.mediator.role}&lt;/span&gt;\\\\\\\"}]},{\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\site-content.json\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"matches\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":26,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Formado em economia pela Universidade Stanford, é fundador da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, organização dedicada a promover a excelência do serviço público brasileiro, e da &lt;strong&gt;MaisProgresso.org&lt;/strong&gt;, dedicada a políticas econômicas para maior crescimento e melhor distribuição de renda. Como cineasta, dirigiu filmes como &lt;em&gt;Fala tu&lt;/em&gt; (2004), &lt;em&gt;Órfãos do Eldorado&lt;/em&gt; (2015) e &lt;em&gt;Oceânico&lt;/em&gt;, a ser lançado em 2026.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":31,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Doutorando (ABD) em Políticas Públicas na Lyndon B. Johnson School of Public Affairs, da Universidade do Texas em Austin, é bacharel em Direito pela UFMG e mestre em Administração Pública pela Columbia University. Atuou por quase uma década no Governo de Minas Gerais e, posteriormente, foi diretor e membro do Conselho da &lt;strong&gt;República.org&lt;/strong&gt;, liderando projetos com governos e parceiros internacionais voltados ao fortalecimento da gestão pública por meio de dados, pesquisa e reformas baseadas em evidências, além de iniciativas de inclusão e desenvolvimento de lideranças no setor público.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":36,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Jornalista com pós-graduação na Universidade da Califórnia em Los Angeles (UCLA), trabalhou por mais de 20 anos nas redações do &lt;em&gt;Jornal do Brasil&lt;/em&gt; e do &lt;em&gt;Globo&lt;/em&gt;, onde atuou como repórter, editora e correspondente em Nova York. De 2017 a 2022, foi head da Hysteria, plataforma de mídia e entretenimento centrada em narrativas femininas da produtora Conspiração. É criadora, roteirista e produtora de uma trilogia de documentários sobre mulheres: &lt;em&gt;De Você Fiz Meu Samba&lt;/em&gt;, &lt;em&gt;Helô&lt;/em&gt; e &lt;em&gt;Mulheres Radicais&lt;/em&gt;.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":41,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&lt;p&gt;Com mais de 20 anos de experiência em finanças corporativas, atuou como diretora financeira da Asgaard Navegação, foi sócia e diretora financeira de sociedade de investimentos e gestão do setor imobiliário e assessora financeira do Bank of America. Formada em Economia, tem MBA na Fundação Getúlio Vargas e é também conselheira profissional pela FGV.&lt;/p&gt;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":58,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"participants\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":63,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Formada em Comunicação Social pela PUC-RJ e em Arquitetura pela USU-RJ, com formação complementar no Insper em Mensuração de Impacto Social e em Gestão de Políticas e Projetos Baseados em Evidências. Foi sócia do Ateliê de Arquitetura por mais de 15 anos. Após atuar por seis anos como diretora do Instituto João e Maria Backheuser (IJMB), assumiu, em 2023, a presidência do Conselho da organização. Desde então, lidera o fortalecimento da governança institucional e a consolidação de parcerias estratégicas com municípios do Estado do Rio de Janeiro, apoiando a estruturação, implementação e monitoramento de políticas públicas de alfabetização orientadas por evidências, com o compromisso de assegurar que todas as crianças sejam alfabetizadas na idade adequada. É uma das fundadoras do movimento EducAçãoRio, que defende uma educação pública de qualidade no Estado do Rio de Janeiro, atuando na mobilização da sociedade civil e no fortalecimento das gestões públicas.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [... omitted end of long line]\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":69,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Gestor público com mais de 15 anos de experiência em funções de liderança em governos e empresas públicas, sendo mais de uma década nas redes estadual e municipal de educação do Rio de Janeiro, incluindo o cargo de Secretário Municipal de Educação. Trabalhou por mais de três anos como consultor em projetos de governos e empresas públicas, entre eles diversas secretarias estaduais de educação. Atualmente é subsecretário executivo da Secretaria Municipal de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. Tem formação nas áreas de administração pública, filosofia política e economia (em conclusão).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":75,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Diretora executiva do Centro de Inovação para a Educação Brasileira (CIEB). Doutora em Ciência Política pelo IESP/UERJ e mestre em Estudos de Desenvolvimento pela Universidade de Londres, foi secretária de Estado de Educação de Minas Gerais, entre 2019 e 2022, e subsecretária de Infraestrutura e Tecnologia da Secretaria de Estado de Educação do Rio de Janeiro. É servidora pública licenciada do RJ pela carreira de especialista em políticas públicas e gestão governamental.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":81,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Economista, há três décadas atua na formulação, implementação e avaliação de políticas públicas voltadas para a redução das desigualdades sociais, com ênfase na educação como vetor de transformação. Um dos idealizadores do Bolsa Família, também concebeu e implementou a Secretaria de Educação Continuada, Alfabetização e Diversidade (SECAD) e liderou o desenvolvimento do programa UPP Social no Rio de Janeiro. Hoje é superintendente executivo do Instituto Unibanco, professor da Fundação Dom Cabral, presidente do Conselho de Administração da Anistia Internacional Brasil e membro do Conselho de Desenvolvimento Econômico Social Sustentável.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"},{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":84,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"mediator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\"}]},{\\\\\\\"file\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"src\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\components\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\Team.jsx\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"matches\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"lineNumber\\\\\\\":29,\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\" the report:\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 1. Project structure\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nlanding/\\\\n├── .cursorindexingignore\\\\n├── .gitignore\\\\n├── .specstory/\\\\n│   ├── .gitignore\\\\n│   ├── .project.json\\\\n│   └── .what-is-this.md\\\\n├── next.config.mjs\\\\n├── package.json\\\\n├── README.md\\\\n├── wrangler.toml\\\\n├── public/\\\\n│   └── images/\\\\n│       ├── brand/        # Logo variants (RioAgora_RGB.png, etc.)\\\\n│       ├── hero/         # Slideshow (slide-01.jpg to slide-04.jpg)\\\\n│       ├── people/       # Team/participant photos\\\\n│       └── agenda/        # Event venue images\\\\n├── src/\\\\n│   ├── app/\\\\n│   │   ├── layout.jsx    # Root layout, metadata, Lenis\\\\n│   │   ├── page.jsx      # Main page (Hero, About, Agenda, Footer)\\\\n│   │   └── globals.css\\\\n│   ├── components/\\\\n│   │   ├── Agenda.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── AnimatedText.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── About.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── Brand.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── EventCard.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── Footer.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── Hero.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── Slideshow.jsx\\\\n│   │   ├── Team.jsx\\\\n│   │   └── Typography.jsx\\\\n│   ├── content/\\\\n│   │   └── site-content.json\\\\n│   ├── providers/\\\\n│   │   └── LenisProvider.jsx\\\\n│   └── typography/\\\\n│       ├── index.js\\\\n│       └── fonts/\\\\n├── out/                  # Static export output\\\\n└── node_modules/\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. Agenda-related files and content\\\\n\\\\n| File | Role |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;src/components/Agenda.jsx&#96; | Agenda section: renders &#96;agenda.title&#96; and the first event via &#96;EventCard&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;src/components/EventCard.jsx&#96; | Event card: participants, bios, mediator, date, location |\\\\n| &#96;src/content/site-content.json&#96; | Agenda data: &#96;agenda.title&#96;, &#96;agenda.events[]&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;README.md&#96; | Docs for &#96;agenda&#96; structure and &#96;public/images/agenda/&#96; |\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;src/components/Agenda.jsx&#96;** (19 lines):\\\\n\\\\n- Uses &#96;content.agenda&#96; from &#96;site-content.json&#96;\\\\n- Renders &#96;agenda.title&#96; and &#96;agenda.events[0]&#96; only\\\\n- Passes the event to &#96;EventCard&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;src/content/site-content.json&#96; – agenda block** (lines 47–91):\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;agenda.title&#96;: &#96;\\\\\\\"Agenda\\\\\\\"&#96;\\\\n- One event: \\\\\\\"Debate 1 – Educação\\\\\\\"\\\\n- Date: 2026-02-23, 16h\\\\n- Location: Auditório do Palácio Capanema\\\\n- Venue image: &#96;/images/agenda/capanema.jpg&#96;\\\\n- 4 participants: Anna Backheuser, Antoine Lousao, Julia Sant'Anna, Ricardo Henriques\\\\n- Mediator: Eloy H.S. Oliveira\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Components that render speaker/palestrante bios or agenda items\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;EventCard.jsx&#96;** – agenda participants/speakers:\\\\n\\\\n- Uses &#96;event.participants&#96; (name, org, image, bio)\\\\n- Shows participant photo as background (desktop) and mobile image\\\\n- Renders &#96;participant.bio&#96; or &#96;participant.org&#96; as plain text\\\\n- Participant selector buttons (name + org)\\\\n- Mediator: &#96;event.mediator.name&#96; and &#96;event.mediator.role&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;Team.jsx&#96;** – team bios (not agenda):\\\\n\\\\n- Uses &#96;team.members&#96; (name, bio, image)\\\\n- Renders &#96;member.bio&#96; as HTML via &#96;RichText&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. &#96;public/images/agenda/&#96; folder\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;.gitignore&#96; ignores &#96;*.jpg&#96;, &#96;*.png&#96;, &#96;*.webp&#96;\\\\n- &#96;site-content.json&#96; references &#96;/images/agenda/capanema.jpg&#96;\\\\n- Glob/search did not find any files in &#96;public/images/agenda/&#96; (likely because image extensions are ignored)\\\\n\\\\n**Expected file:** &#96;public/images/agenda/capanema.jpg&#96; (Palácio Capanema venue image)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. &#96;src/components/&#96; structure\\\\n\\\\n| Component | Purpose |\\\\n|-----------|---------|\\\\n| &#96;Agenda.jsx&#96; | Agenda section, uses &#96;EventCard&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;AnimatedText.jsx&#96; | Split-text reveal animation |\\\\n| &#96;About.jsx&#96; | \\\\\\\"O que somos\\\\\\\" section |\\\\n| &#96;Brand.jsx&#96; | Logo/branding |\\\\n| &#96;EventCard.jsx&#96; | Event card with participants, bios, mediator |\\\\n| &#96;Footer.jsx&#96; | Footer with copyright |\\\\n| &#96;Hero.jsx&#96; | Hero with slideshow |\\\\n| &#96;Slideshow.jsx&#96; | Image slideshow |\\\\n| &#96;Team.jsx&#96; | \\\\\\\"Quem Somos\\\\\\\" team members |\\\\n| &#96;Typography.jsx&#96; | SectionTitle, SectionText, CardName, RichText |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. Search for \\\\\\\"Temporão\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Miguel Lago\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"palestrante\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"speaker\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n- **Temporão, Miguel Lago, Kelly Curitiba, Lígia Bahia, Ricardo de Oliveira** – only in &#96;README.md&#96; (lines 121–139), as draft/copy, not in &#96;site-content.json&#96; or components.\\\\n- **\\\\\\\"palestrante\\\\\\\"** – only in &#96;README.md&#96; (line 128) in Kelly Curitiba’s bio.\\\\n- **\\\\\\\"speaker\\\\\\\"** – no matches in the codebase.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Summary\\\\n\\\\n- Agenda is driven by &#96;site-content.json&#96; and rendered by &#96;Agenda.jsx&#96; + &#96;EventCard.jsx&#96;.\\\\n- &#96;EventCard&#96; shows participants (name, org, image, bio) and mediator.\\\\n- &#96;README.md&#96; contains draft bios for José Gomes Temporão, Miguel Lago, Kelly Curitiba, Lígia Bahia, Ricardo de Oliveira that are not yet in &#96;site-content.json&#96;.\\\\n- &#96;public/images/agenda/&#96; is expected to contain &#96;capanema.jpg&#96;; the folder may be empty or ignored by Oliveira (same role)\n\n**5 participants** with inferred &#96;org&#96; from bios and photos from &#96;public/images/agenda/&#96;:\n\n| Name | org | image |\n|------|-----|-------|\n| Jose Gomes Temporao | ex-Ministro da Saude | &#96;/images/agenda/jose-gomes.png&#96; |\n| Kelly Curitiba | Secretaria Municipal de Saude/RJ | &#96;/images/agenda/kelly.png&#96; |\n| Ligia Bahia | UFRJ | &#96;/images/agenda/ligia-bahia.png&#96; |\n| Miguel Lago | Sciences Po Paris / Columbia University | &#96;/images/agenda/miguel-lago.png&#96; |\n| Ricardo de Oliveira | ex-Secretario de Saude do ES | &#96;/images/agenda/ricardo-oliveira.png&#96; |\n\nEach participant gets the full bio text provided by the user.\n\n### 2.
